title: Larcele Mini Building Blocks Animal Set, DIY Micro 3D Building Toy Bricks,999 pcs KLJM-05 (Black Cat)
features: The bricks are Very Tiny, please look over the images before order. We suggest you hold the pieces with a tweezer (not included).

Install layer by layer, follow the instructions to find the point where each layer fits. The instructions maybe a little complex, please be patient and you will enjoy it. Once the first few layers have been completed it gets a lot easier.
Micro assembled toy bricks made of plastic. Instructions included. One set with 999 pieces.
Also it's a leisure game for adults, funny and reduce pressure. Good for display, great for one who love building blocks.
